experimental_design: clinical significance of tRF-24 in ESCC
The clinical significance of tRF-24 was investigated in samples from 96 ESCC patients.
factor_value: tRF-24 was the most upregulated in neoplastic lesions compared to normal counterparts.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: We analyzed a prospectively maintained cohort of 96 untreated ESCC patients.
